name: Grilled Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the unpeeled potatoes until tender.
2. Drain and cut the potatoes into desired shapes.
3. Add the olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Toss the potatoes to coat evenly with the oil and seasoning mixture.
5. Grill the potato pieces in a basket until golden brown, about 15 minutes.
6. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
7. Toss gently to combine.
8. Garnish with Parmesan cheese before serving.
